arg.name: serial_port
arg.description: str: Which port is the serial device on?

arg.name: motor_ids
arg.description: list: ids of the motors you're connecting. If you're reading sensors, the ids should match the fingers your sensors are on (1 = thumb, 5 = pinky)

arg.name: control_mode
arg.description: 0, 1: Should the motors start up with torque off or on?

arg.name: plotter
arg.description: (bool) Launch plotjuggler to view motor goal messages?

arg.name: motors
arg.description: (bool) Run motors? If false, only the serial_reader will launch
